parameters.prompt: One photorealistic two-person orbital-station operations console, 3.0 m wide, 1.25 m high and 1.05 m deep. Structural pedestal, angled work surface, replaceable physical display bezels, guarded switches, rotary controls, communication handset cradles, handholds, ventilation, cable access and rear service panels. Civil traffic-control and docking hardware with ergonomic reach and layered depth, isolated single object, operator side faces -Z. No chairs, room, floating screens, holograms, fake text, logos, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic station control hardware: low-glare graphite composite, off-white alloy shell, anodized metal bezels, physical black display glass, brushed controls, restrained amber and cyan lenses, subtle hand wear, no baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, random grime, or active emissive content.

strengths: two-person operations console has coherent work surfaces, display tiers and rear service mass
operator cavity and control hierarchy remain readable in orthographic views
required_cleanup: delete one minor disconnected fragment and replace generated controls and display content
separate display glass, handset, guarded controls and access panels by stable ID
verify two standing or seated reach envelopes and corridor circulation
